title: Tacitus, Histories Book 1: The Year of Four Emperors
description: Histories Book 1: The Year of Four Emperors
introduction: Histories Book 1: The Year of Four Emperors

translation.text: I begin in the year of the consulship of Servius Galba and Titus Vinius. The empire passed to four men in a single year: Galba, Otho, Vitellius, Vespasian.
